learning.leakage_note: do not train on this Nano split's conversations, table IDs, qrels, or target metadata records

synthetic_data.document_generation: table metadata with title, dimensions, survey, frequency, subject, date range, and geography
synthetic_data.question_generation: partial support conversations asking for official statistics
synthetic_data.answerability: positive table should satisfy the user's measure, geography, sector, and time requirement

references.title: A Dataset for Retrieving Data Tables through Conversations with Genuine Intents

query.text: [{'content': 'Bonjour,', 'role': 'user'}, {'content': "J'aimerais connaître le moyen de trouver le PIB nominal par habitant d'une province, son PIB réel, son taux de croissance économique ainsi que son taux d'inflation. Je ne parvient pas à les trouver.", 'role': 'user'}, {'content': 'Merci', 'role': 'user'}, {'content': 'Veuillez lire ci-dessous :', 'role': 'operator'}, {'content': 'PIB provincial 36-10-0402-01 (https://www150.statcan.gc.ca/t1/tbl1/fr/tv.action?pid=3610040201&request_locale=fr)
